home.freeTitle: No pricing. No plans. No catch.
home.freeDesc: Every tool on FinancePlots is free — including PDF and Excel exports. No account, no credit card, no time limit. Finance tools should be accessible to everyone.
home.customDesc: We build bespoke financial dashboards for companies — branded, connected to your data, and delivered as a hosted link or self-hosted Docker file.
home.custom1Desc: Monthly revenue, burn rate, MoM growth, churn — all from your spreadsheet or database.
home.custom2Desc: 13-week rolling forecast with actuals tracking, variance alerts and PDF reporting.
home.custom3Desc: Client-facing portfolio dashboard with performance, allocation and risk metrics.
home.customStep1: You describe the KPIs and data sources you need
home.customStep2: We build a custom Streamlit dashboard in 3–5 days
home.customStep3: Delivered as a hosted link or Docker file (runs in your environment)
home.customStep4: One-time project fee — no recurring charges

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: FP&A guides for individuals, finance teams, and wealth managers.

articles.title: How to Build a Personal Budget That Actually Works
articles.description: Most people try to budget and give up within a month. A simple, honest framework for taking control of your money — income, expenses, savings rate, and what to do first.

articles.title: The 13-Week Cash Flow Forecast: Why Every Business Needs One
articles.description: Profit and cash are not the same thing. A 13-week rolling cash forecast is the single most important tool for any business managing liquidity.

articles.title: DCF Valuation Explained: How to Value a Business Using Discounted Cash Flow
articles.description: The gold standard for business valuation — how to build a DCF model, choose a discount rate, and interpret the output correctly.

articles.title: Break-Even Analysis: The First Financial Calculation Every Business Owner Should Know
articles.description: Fixed costs, variable costs, contribution margin, margin of safety — and why every pricing decision should start here.

articles.title: How to Analyse Your Investment Portfolio: Return, Risk and Diversification
articles.description: Most investors track returns. The best investors track risk-adjusted returns. Here's what to measure and why.

articles.title: How to Build a 5-Year Financial Model for Your Business
articles.description: Investors and banks ask for 5-year projections. Here's how to build a three-statement model that actually holds up under scrutiny.

articles.title: How to Build an Annual Budget That Your Finance Team Will Actually Use
articles.description: Most company budgets fail because they're set once and never revisited. Here's how to build one that drives real decisions.

articles.title: Why Financial Forecasting Is the Most Underused Tool in Business
articles.description: Most businesses react to numbers. The best ones anticipate them. Here's why forecasting is the foundation of every sound business decision.

articles.title: Bootstrapping & Runway: How to Extend Your Startup's Life Without Giving Up Equity
articles.description: Every month of runway is a month of optionality. How founders can think rigorously about burn rate and capital efficiency.

articles.title: The UK Pension Puzzle: Why Starting Early Could Mean £200,000 More in Retirement
articles.description: How the UK tax system makes pension contributions one of the most efficient wealth-building tools available.

articles.title: Power BI vs Streamlit: Which One Is Right for Your Finance Team?
articles.description: An honest comparison of two popular analytics tools — pros, cons, and when to use each.
